description: A schema for a Site Builder page
formgrid:
draft .
title title
description description
image .
---Routing---
nav .
route template
status redirectTo
---Features---
middleware middleware
accessGroups accessGroups
---Page Data---
data data
---Sitemap---
sitemap .
changeFrequency priority
---
id id
updated created

title.label: Page Title
title.help: The page title, used in the title tag and navigation

route.label: URL Path
route.help: URL path for this page. Use {param} for dynamic segments (e.g. /products/{id}).

template.label: Page Template
template.help: The page template to render. Multiple pages can share the same template. Create a template first under Site Builder if none are listed.

description.label: Meta Description
description.help: SEO meta description for this page

image.label: Page Image
image.help: Used for og:image social previews and as a hero image when the template renders one.

draft.label: Draft
draft.help: Draft pages are excluded from routing

nav.label: Show in Nav
nav.help: Include this page in navigation menus

data.label: Page Data
data.help: Optional JSON data exposed to the template as page.data.*. Use this for one-off page content (hero text, CTAs, etc.) without creating a one-row collection.

middleware.label: Features
middleware.help: Optional behaviors to enable on this page — for example, requiring a logged-in visitor (auth). Features run in order; the first one to short-circuit (e.g. redirect to login) stops the rest. Additional features can be added by extensions.

accessGroups.label: Access Groups
accessGroups.help: Restrict the auth middleware to users in one or more access groups. Leave blank to allow any logged-in user. Logged-in users not in the listed groups get a 403 response (no redirect to login).

status.label: HTTP Status Code
status.help: HTTP status code returned when this page is served. Set to 404 to designate this as the universal Not Found page (rendered for any URL that doesn't match). Use 410 for permanently removed content, 451 for legal takedowns, 301/302 to redirect.

redirectTo.label: Redirect To
redirectTo.help: Destination for the redirect. Can be an absolute URL or a path on this site (e.g. /new-page).

sitemap.label: Include in Sitemap
sitemap.help: Include this page in the generated sitemap.xml

changeFrequency.label: Change Frequency
changeFrequency.help: How frequently the page is likely to change. Hint to crawlers — most search engines ignore this.

priority.label: Priority
priority.help: Priority of this page relative to other pages on the site (0.0 to 1.0). Leave blank to omit.
